1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py` 3. `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/ -xvs`
Report all errors with full output.

## Results Summary
All checks passed successfully.

### 2. Ruff Format Check **ruff format --check**: 6 files already formatted
